headline: Wells Fargo Sees Ecolab (ECL) Well Positioned to Navigate Commodity Cost Pressures
summary: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) is included among the 10 Best S&P 500 Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. Wells Fargo analyst Jason Haas raised his price target on Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) to $275 from $260 on June 10 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the stock. The firm recently met with IR executive Andy Hedberg […]
